# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build Application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Prepare Artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts
          cp -r build/* artifacts/
          cp config/*.json artifacts/
          cp scripts/deploy.sh artifacts/

      - name: Upload Artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: application-artifacts
          path: artifacts/**

      - name: Notify Team
        uses: actions/github-script@v5
        with:
          script: |
            const message = 'Build completed and artifacts uploaded. You can download them from the [Actions tab](https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}).';
            await github.issues.createComment({
              issue_number: 1,
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              body: message
            });
